name: Fassi Gru S.p.A.
message: Fassi Gru S.p.A. Fassi Gru S.p.A. - Loader cranes manufacturer since 1965. Fassi Gru is the market leader among Italian producers. Its product range and sales numbers place it among the top producers of hydraulic cranes in the world.
